examples: He was also attracted by the French symbolist poetry.
Symbolist Textuality, Aestheticism, Relation to Image the Flaneur and the City.
Magical poetics and intellectual poetics were essential parts of his symbolist poetics.
"Bruges-La-Morte, " a tale of obsessive love, is a Symbolist novel, perhaps the Symbolist novel.
The Belgian Symbolist artist James Ensor (1860-1949) was an odd man out in late-19th-century vanguard painting, and his best work is nearly as dense and bewildering today.
